# Ike Bindings

> Generated bindings for the IkeFoundation knowledge set: resolved UUID literals with
> definitions as javadoc, autocompletable in any IDE. Depends only on the
> terms surface, so consumers stay light.

## Other

- [Dependencies (SBOM)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-bindings/dependencies.html.md)
- [Licenses (SPDX)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-bindings/licenses.html.md)
- [Built With](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-bindings/built-with.html.md)

- [About](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-bindings/index.html.md)
